text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
choice_data_list: Hey! You sure are chipper today!
Hey! You sure are chipper today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I let myself have a good day of rest
yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Resting's great for muscle recovery too. It's super
essential for the body!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Downtime between twenty-four and forty-eight
hours increases your muscle strength. It really
helps you out in your next performance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nothing but rest isn't good either though, so you
need to change up which areas you work out
each—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what am I saying? Of course you already
know all this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, time to go out there and get to working
out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Tough it out today so my body can feel good
later!
